summary: Local Golden Path validators now require regeneration-marked image evidence with canonical input lineage to an initial live image, and the current candidate collector assembles existing live text, source, image, regeneration, and export artifacts into a blocked DF-241/DF-242 evidence bundle with direct artifact regression coverage. The candidate is now also emitted through the packaged-run producer as a blocked handoff artifact. No signed packaged production Golden Path has completed from login through export.
